description: Tasks that require photographing specific locations, events, conditions, or progress for documentation purposes

tasks.title: Document Storm Damage - Maple Street Neighborhood
tasks.description: Photograph storm damage throughout Maple Street neighborhood after last night's windstorm. Focus on downed trees, property damage, and blocked roads. Helps insurance companies and city planning assess damage extent.

evidence_schema.description: Overview photo of damaged area with GPS location
Specific damage examples (trees, property, infrastructure)
Brief damage assessment and affected area description

tasks.title: Photograph New Mural - Arts District
tasks.description: Document the new community mural on the side of Miller's Coffee House in the Arts District. Capture full mural and detail shots for community art archive and artist portfolio.

evidence_schema.description: Full mural from appropriate distance
Close-up detail shots of artwork
Mural theme/subject and approximate dimensions

tasks.title: Document Construction Progress - Metro Station
tasks.description: Take progress photos of the new Metro station construction at 42nd and Grand. Compare with previous month's progress. Focus on structural elements and completion percentage.

evidence_schema.description: Construction site overview with GPS coordinates
Key structural elements and progress details
Estimated completion percentage

tasks.title: Photograph Farmers Market Setup - Saturday Morning
tasks.description: Document the weekly farmers market setup process at Central Plaza. Capture vendor stalls, product displays, and crowd attendance between 8-10 AM for market analysis.

evidence_schema.description: Market overview showing vendor layout
Variety of products and vendor displays
Estimated vendor count and customer attendance

tasks.title: Document Pothole Conditions - Industrial Avenue
tasks.description: Photograph significant potholes along Industrial Avenue between 1st and 5th Streets. Mark locations with GPS for city maintenance department road repair prioritization.

evidence_schema.description: Each significant pothole with GPS location
Approximate size/severity of each pothole
Priority level for repairs (low/medium/high/urgent)

tasks.title: Capture Sunset from Harbor Viewpoint
tasks.description: Photograph tonight's sunset from Harbor Viewpoint for tourism board promotional materials. Include harbor boats and city skyline in frame. Golden hour timing preferred.

evidence_schema.description: High-quality sunset photo with harbor and skyline
Exact time of sunset and weather conditions

tasks.title: Document Food Truck Festival - University Campus
tasks.description: Photograph the monthly food truck festival at University Campus. Capture food truck variety, student crowds, and popular items for event planning and marketing purposes.

evidence_schema.description: Festival overview showing all food trucks
Popular food items and student engagement
Truck count, cuisine types, and crowd estimate

tasks.title: Photograph Historic Building Restoration - City Hall
tasks.description: Document the ongoing restoration work on the historic City Hall building facade. Focus on architectural details being preserved and modern additions being made.

evidence_schema.description: Building facade showing restoration progress
Architectural detail preservation work
Restoration techniques and materials being used

tasks.title: Document Street Art Changes - Underground District
tasks.description: Photograph the current state of street art in the Underground District. Compare with previous photos to track changes, new additions, and removed pieces for urban art documentation.
tasks.location_hint: Underground District, known street art corridors

evidence_schema.description: Multiple street art pieces with locations
New or recently modified artwork
Changes since last documentation and artist info if visible

tasks.title: Capture Holiday Light Display - Residential Contest
tasks.description: Photograph the top 5 entries in the neighborhood holiday light display contest on Christmas Tree Lane. Document displays for contest judging and community newsletter.

evidence_schema.description: Each of the 5 nominated house displays
House addresses and brief description of each display
